headline: 2026年7月17日娱乐速递：新片上映，热点纷呈
headlineEn: July 17, 2026 Entertainment Digest: New Releases, Hot Trends
summary: 今日一部新片上映，本周共三部新片。热门趋势包括《奥德赛》《后室》《幸运女神》等。行业亮点：多部影片定档，暑期档竞争激烈。
summaryEn: One new movie released today, three this week. Top trends include 'Odyssey', 'The Backrooms', 'Lady Luck'. Industry highlights: multiple films scheduled, fierce summer competition.

industryHighlights.text: 《安昂传奇：最后的气宗》定档，备受期待
industryHighlights.en: 'Avatar: The Last Airbender' scheduled, highly anticipated

industryHighlights.text: 《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》官宣即将上映
industryHighlights.en: 'Spider-Man: Brand New Day' announced for upcoming release

industryHighlights.text: 本周新片《痴迷》口碑不俗，跻身热门
industryHighlights.en: This week's new film 'Obsession' earns good word-of-mouth, enters trending

industryHighlights.text: 《火遮眼》《鬼玩人：炼狱》持续引发讨论
industryHighlights.en: 'Blazing Eyes' and 'Evil Dead: Purgatory' continue to spark discussion

industryHighlights.text: 《末日地堡》热度不减，本周仍上榜
industryHighlights.en: 'Doomsday Bunker' remains popular, still on weekly chart
